project.name: MemberBase
project.description: Open-source PHP NGO member management system with accounting, CSV import, REST API, and versioned DB migrations

nodes.name: bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: Core application bootstrap — establishes the PDO database connection, loads app settings and compta types, defines virtual filter constants, and provides shared utility functions (getMaxVal, auditLog, pendingMigrations, migrationDrift).

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Authentication and session management — starts the session, provides login/logout, CSRF token generation/validation, and role-based access guards (isAdmin, isManager, canWrite, canRead).

nodes.name: migrations.php
nodes.summary: Shared database migration and backup helpers — discovers, applies, and tracks SQL migrations (mbRunPendingMigrations, mbPendingMigrations) and streams a pure-PHP full SQL dump (mbDumpDatabase), usable from both CLI and web.

nodes.name: pure.php
nodes.summary: Pure stateless helper functions with no side effects — date parsing/formatting (formatedDateToTimeStamp, timeStampToformatedDate) and typographic apostrophe normalization (unquote), extracted for unit-testability.

nodes.name: import_fields.php
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for CSV import field definitions — provides importable member field labels (importFieldLabels), allowed field list (importAllowedFields), civility normalizer (importNormalizeSexe), and per-field value normalizer (importFieldValue).

nodes.name: actions.php
nodes.summary: Action router — validates CSRF on POST requests, then dispatches the requested action to the appropriate handler file (members, groups, compta, import, auth, etc.) via a static action-to-handler map.

nodes.name: views.php
nodes.summary: View router — maps view names to their template files and enforces role-based guards, with support for request overrides and view variable aliasing before including the view file.

nodes.name: index.php
nodes.summary: Main application entry point — bootstraps auth, loads all core classes and locales, renders the full HTML shell with navigation/toasts/footer for full-page requests or a bare content fragment for htmx partial requests, then delegates to the action and view routers.

nodes.name: login.php
nodes.summary: Login page — validates a separate login-scoped CSRF token, authenticates credentials via authLogin, logs failed attempts to the audit log, and redirects authenticated users to the app or password-change view.

nodes.name: install.php
nodes.summary: Five-step web installer — checks prerequisites, writes conf/db.php, initialises the full schema from an embedded SQL block, seeds organisation settings and compta types, creates the initial admin account, and baselines all migrations.

nodes.name: health.php
nodes.summary: Unauthenticated health-check endpoint — returns JSON {status:ok} (HTTP 200) when the DB is reachable and all migrations are applied, or {status:degraded} (HTTP 503) otherwise.

nodes.name: export.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only database export endpoint — streams a full SQL dump as a file download using mbDumpDatabase, guarded by requireLogin and isAdmin, with audit logging.

nodes.name: getMaxVal
nodes.summary: Reads or initialises a sequence counter from the maxval table for a given parameter name.

nodes.name: updateAndGetMaxVal
nodes.summary: Increments and returns the next value for a named sequence counter in the maxval table.

nodes.name: pendingMigrations
nodes.summary: Returns the list of migration filenames not yet recorded in schema_migrations; used for the admin alert banner.

nodes.name: migrationDrift
nodes.summary: Returns migration versions whose on-disk file content no longer matches the stored SHA-256 checksum, signalling post-apply tampering.

nodes.name: auditLog
nodes.summary: Inserts a row into audit_log with the current session user, action name, optional detail, and optional subject user ID.

nodes.name: authLogin
nodes.summary: Validates credentials against app_users, regenerates the session ID, populates session variables, and updates last_login on success.

nodes.name: csrfToken
nodes.summary: Returns (generating on first call) the per-session CSRF token stored in $_SESSION['csrf'].

nodes.name: csrfCheck
nodes.summary: Validates the submitted CSRF token (from POST field or X-CSRF-Token header) against the session token using constant-time comparison.

nodes.name: mbRunPendingMigrations
nodes.summary: Applies all pending SQL migrations in order within transactions, recording each version and its SHA-256 checksum in schema_migrations on success.

nodes.name: mbDumpDatabase
nodes.summary: Streams a complete SQL dump of all tables to output using pure PHP (no mysqldump), with DROP/CREATE and INSERT statements, flushing periodically.

nodes.name: formatedDateToTimeStamp
nodes.summary: Parses a d/m/Y date string to a Unix timestamp, returning 0 for empty or invalid input.

nodes.name: unquote
nodes.summary: Replaces typographic right apostrophes (U+2019) with straight apostrophes in a string.

nodes.name: importNormalizeSexe
nodes.summary: Normalises a free-text civility string to the users.sexe enum value (na/f/m/hf) using regex keyword matching.

nodes.name: importFieldValue
nodes.summary: Applies per-field normalization to a raw CSV value — delegates sexe to importNormalizeSexe and all other fields to unquote.

nodes.name: installerPdo
nodes.summary: Creates and returns a PDO connection using constants defined by conf/db.php, used exclusively during installation steps.

nodes.name: health_respond
nodes.summary: Emits a JSON health status response with the given HTTP code and terminates execution.

nodes.name: user_class.php
nodes.summary: User domain entity with CRUD operations, compta/team membership queries, and a static filtered list builder used by the members list view.

nodes.name: User
nodes.summary: Holds and persists a single member record; provides lookup, save, remove, and accounting/team relationship methods.

nodes.name: compta_class.php
nodes.summary: Compta domain entity for individual accounting entries plus static batch queries for badge display and activity summaries.

nodes.name: Compta
nodes.summary: Holds and persists a single compta entry; provides typesByUser and activitySummaryByUser static batch methods.

nodes.name: team_class.php
nodes.summary: Team (segment/group) entity with CRUD, metagroup membership management, and a dropdown list builder.

nodes.name: Team
nodes.summary: Holds and persists a single team record; manages metagroup associations and guards removal when members exist.

nodes.name: metagroup_class.php
nodes.summary: Metagroup entity representing a named filter group-of-groups, with static helpers to list member team IDs/names.

nodes.name: Metagroup
nodes.summary: Holds and persists a metagroup record; provides filterList, teamIds, and teamNames static queries.

nodes.name: property_class.php
nodes.summary: UserProperty entity for key/value user attributes and follow-up (suivi) entries stored in user_properties table.

nodes.name: UserProperty
nodes.summary: Holds and persists a single user_properties row (team membership flags, suivi values, etc.).

nodes.name: member_filter_class.php
nodes.summary: MemberFilter resolves virtual negative team-ID filters to concrete user-ID sets using accounting and membership rules.

nodes.name: MemberFilter
nodes.summary: Static class that converts virtual filter IDs (FILTER_UNPAID_COTI_3Y, FILTER_NO_ACTIVITY_10Y, etc.) into user-ID maps via SQL.

nodes.name: members.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for member CRUD: addUser, updateUser, mergeUsers (transactional), anonymizeUser, deactivate/reactivate/delete.

nodes.name: compta.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for accounting entries: addCompta, updateCompta, deleteComptaEntry, and toggleWantsAttestation.

nodes.name: groups.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for group management: create/rename/delete teams, bulk visibility, member import from other groups or cotisants/donors.

nodes.name: settings.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for application settings persistence and accounting type management (add, update, delete, reorder).

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for authentication operations: logout, password change, app user management, password reset, and audit log flush.

nodes.name: import.php
nodes.summary: 3-step CSV/TSV import wizard handler: file upload/parse, field mapping and member creation, duplicate resolution.

nodes.name: maintenance.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for admin DB maintenance: applies pending SQL migrations via mbRunPendingMigrations with backup confirmation guard.

nodes.name: metagroups.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for metagroup/category management: CRUD, category order, team-to-category assignment, and filter group team updates.

nodes.name: suivi.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for follow-up (suivi) entries: addSuivi and updateSuivi via UserProperty entity.

nodes.name: users_list.php
nodes.summary: Member list view with segment/filter dropdown, DataTables table, and AJAX search/navigation via /api/members.

nodes.name: users_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Member detail shell that renders a tab bar (fiche, compta, suivi, historique) and includes the appropriate sub-view along with a financial mini-dashboard.

nodes.name: users_general_data.php
nodes.summary: Inline view/edit panel for member personal data using Alpine.js and the PUT /api/members/{id} endpoint.

nodes.name: users_merge.php
nodes.summary: UI for merging two duplicate member records: field-by-field comparison, survivor selection, and confirmation dialog.

nodes.name: users_add_form.php
nodes.summary: Form for creating a new member, pre-filling last name from search string and optionally assigning to a segment.

nodes.name: users_history.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only view of a member's full activity log from the audit_log table, displayed with DataTables.

nodes.name: compta_list.php
nodes.summary: Accounting entries list for a member with year/type filters, an add-entry inline form, and Chart.js donut and timeline charts.

nodes.name: compta_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Form for editing or deleting a single accounting entry (type, date, label, amount, receipt, attestation flag).

nodes.name: donors_summary.php
nodes.summary: Donation overview dashboard with KPI cards (total, donors, active members), a pie chart breakdown by type, and a filterable donor table with bulk attestation PDF generation.

nodes.name: import_step1.php
nodes.summary: Import wizard step 1: CSV/TSV file upload form with error feedback.

nodes.name: import_step2.php
nodes.summary: Import wizard step 2: column-to-field mapping table with auto-detection and segment assignment options.

nodes.name: import_step3.php
nodes.summary: Import wizard step 3: import results summary and per-duplicate resolution form (ignore/fill/overwrite).

nodes.name: settings_health.php
nodes.summary: Admin health panel showing runtime info, DB version, migration status (pending/drift), volume counters, and last audit activity.

nodes.name: settings_general.php
nodes.summary: Application settings page covering segments, filters, and accounting types, organized into tabbed panes.

nodes.name: settings_app_users.php
nodes.summary: Admin panel for managing application user accounts including invitations, roles, and password resets.

nodes.name: settings_integrity.php
nodes.summary: Admin data-integrity tool that detects duplicate members by name or email and links to the merge view.

nodes.name: menu.php
nodes.summary: Responsive Bootstrap navbar with desktop and mobile layouts, search forms, and active-view highlighting.

nodes.name: donor_table.php
nodes.summary: Reusable DataTables-powered member/donor table component that accepts extra columns and a row-href callback.

nodes.name: resources_fr.php
nodes.summary: French locale file that populates the global $GLOBAL array with all user-visible labels, buttons, and messages.

nodes.name: API Bootstrap
nodes.summary: Shared bootstrap for all REST API endpoints: sets JSON headers, enforces authentication, CSRF content-type guard, and per-user rate limiting (600 req/min).

nodes.name: API /api/members
nodes.summary: Full CRUD REST endpoint for member records: list (paginated, search, virtual filters), get, create, update, and deactivate/delete with audit logging.

nodes.name: API /api/compta
nodes.summary: CRUD REST endpoint for accounting entries (cotisations/donations) per member, with type validation and audit logging.

nodes.name: API /api/groups
nodes.summary: REST endpoint for group (team/segment) management: list, get, create, rename, delete groups, and add/remove member membership; manager role required for mutations.

nodes.name: API /api/suivi
nodes.summary: CRUD REST endpoint for follow-up notes (suivi) attached to members, stored as user_properties rows with parameter='suivi'.

nodes.name: API /api/compta-types
nodes.summary: Read-only REST endpoint returning all accounting types ordered by sort_order; used as a reference list by the compta endpoint.

nodes.name: DB Migration CLI
nodes.summary: CLI runner for versioned database migrations: applies pending sql files, reports status with drift detection, and supports baseline mode for fresh installs.

nodes.name: DB Backup Script
nodes.summary: Shell script that dumps the MariaDB database using mysqldump with consistent-snapshot options; reads DB credentials from conf/db.php or environment variables.

nodes.name: DB Restore Script
nodes.summary: Shell script that restores the MariaDB database from a SQL dump file; destructive operation requiring a prior backup.

nodes.name: Frontend App JS
nodes.summary: Application-wide JavaScript: CSRF token propagation to htmx requests and native forms, dirty-form guard with beforeunload/htmx interception, and save/membership toast handling.

nodes.name: TipTap Editor JS
nodes.summary: ES module that wires the self-hosted TipTap rich-text editor to the member comment field, reinitializing after every htmx swap.

nodes.name: Member General Form Alpine Component
nodes.summary: Alpine.js component for inline editing of member general data, sending only changed fields as a PATCH to /api/members/{id} with CSRF token.

nodes.name: Playwright Global Setup
nodes.summary: Playwright global setup that resets the test database and persists browser auth states for all four roles (admin, manager, user, readonly).

nodes.name: API E2E Tests
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E tests for all REST API endpoints: auth guard, CRUD for members/compta/groups/suivi, and compta-types read-only verification.

nodes.name: Roles E2E Tests
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E tests verifying role-based access control: UI element visibility and HTTP 403 enforcement for readonly/user/manager/admin roles.

nodes.name: Personas Permission Audit Tests
nodes.summary: Permission audit tests driven by a truth table of allowed/denied capabilities per persona, covering both view guards and REST API 403 responses.

nodes.name: DB Maintenance E2E Tests
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E tests for admin DB maintenance: SQL export endpoint authentication/content, and forbidden access check for readonly role.

nodes.name: Database Schema
nodes.summary: Full idempotent MariaDB schema (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS) for all MemberBase entities: users, teams, metagroups, compta, user_properties, schema_migrations, etc.

nodes.name: Docker Compose
nodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration defining three services: PHP app (port 8080), MariaDB 11 with health check, and Adminer (port 8082) for local development.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Developer convenience Makefile wrapping Docker Compose commands (up/down/logs/shell/db), DB operations (import/backup/restore/migrate), and test runners (Playwright + PHPUnit).

nodes.name: README
nodes.summary: Project overview documenting MemberBase features (members, segments, compta, exports), installation steps, and links to all documentation.

nodes.name: Contributing Guide
nodes.summary: Contributor guide covering dev setup, code style rules (PHP, JS, CSRF, locale), migration conventions, and test/PR workflow.

nodes.name: API Reference
nodes.summary: Complete REST API reference (v3.5.6) documenting all endpoints, authentication (session cookie), role permissions, response format, routing, and curl examples.

nodes.name: Architecture Documentation
nodes.summary: Architecture overview describing the single-entry-point pattern, htmx/Alpine.js frontend approach, REST API separation, DB schema layers, and request flow.

layers.name: Infrastructure
layers.description: Core bootstrap, auth, session, CSRF, DB connection and migration runner

layers.name: Domain Classes
layers.description: ORM-like PHP classes for members, accounting entries, groups, and filters

layers.name: REST API
layers.description: JSON REST endpoints under /api/ with session auth and role-based access control

layers.name: Action Handlers
layers.description: POST action dispatchers for all state-changing operations, behind CSRF guard

layers.name: Views & Partials
layers.description: PHP view fragments rendered via htmx partial requests or full page load

layers.name: Frontend JS
layers.description: Client-side Alpine.js components, htmx config, DataTables setup, and TipTap rich-text editor

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Playwright E2E test suite plus PHPUnit unit tests for pure business logic

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Guides for users, admins, API consumers, contributors, and production operators

layers.name: CLI Tools
layers.description: Command-line migration runner and backup/restore scripts for production ops

tour.title: Entry Points
tour.description: Start with index.php (single app entry point) and login.php to understand request flow and authentication.

tour.title: Core Infrastructure
tour.description: bootstrap.php wires up PDO, app settings, and helpers. auth.php handles sessions and CSRF. migrations.php manages schema versioning.

tour.title: Domain Model
tour.description: User, Compta, Team, Metagroup, and MemberFilter classes are the core domain objects. MemberFilter translates virtual filter IDs into SQL.

tour.title: Routing
tour.description: actions.php dispatches POST actions behind a CSRF gate. views.php routes GET view requests with role guards.

tour.title: REST API
tour.description: JSON API under /api/ — members, compta, groups, suivi — with session auth and 4-level RBAC. _bootstrap.php enforces rate limiting and Content-Type.

tour.title: Key Views
tour.description: users_list.php is the main DataTables list; donors_summary.php is the financial KPI dashboard; settings_health.php is the admin observability panel.

tour.title: Frontend
tour.description: app.js wires htmx, CSRF propagation, DataTables, and the dirty-form guard. tiptap-editor.js renders the rich-text note field.

tour.title: Production Tools
tour.description: migrate.php applies versioned DB migrations (also via web UI). backup.sh/restore.sh handle dump/restore without mysqldump dependency on the app side.
